skills.description: Allies adjacent to the user have a Luck x 0.5% chance of receiving half damage from enemy attacks.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率=同伴的幸运÷2%。邻接的同伴受到攻击时伤害减半

skills.description: Adds 10% to skill activation rates.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 特技发动率+10%

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, Avoid +30.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 自己发动攻击时，回避+30

skills.description: At the start of battle, when the user has under half HP, they attack first.
skills.descriptionZhHans: HP一半以下时，受到敌方攻击时先制攻击

skills.description: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering 5 consecutive hits with half damage.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝技÷2%。连续发动伤害减半的5次攻击

skills.description: When user is equipped with a Sword, damage +5 during battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 装备剑战斗时，造成的伤害+5

skills.description: After battle, enemy's Strength -6.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗后，敌人力-6，逐回合恢复
notes: Enemy debuffs do not stack with another debuff to the same stat; the larger value takes priority, and affected stats recover by 1 each turn.
notesZhHans: 敌方减益不会与对同一属性的另一减益叠加；取较大值生效，受影响的属性每回合恢复 1 点。

provenance.locator: Master of Arms > Seal Strength > Level 5

skills.description: During battles, damage +10, damage received +10.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗中，对敌方造成的伤害+10，受到敌方造成的伤害+10

provenance.locator: Master of Arms > Life and Death > Level 15

skills.description: After battle, enemy's Resistance -6.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗后，敌人魔防-6，逐回合恢复
notes: Enemy debuffs do not stack with another debuff to the same stat; the larger value takes priority, and affected stats recover by 1 each turn.
notesZhHans: 敌方减益不会与对同一属性的另一减益叠加；取较大值生效，受影响的属性每回合恢复 1 点。

skills.description: Select the "Shove" command to push an adjacent ally 1 tile.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 可使用撞击（体当たり）指令，将一个邻接的我方撞开1格

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, Critical rate +20.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 自己发动攻击时，必杀+20

skills.description: When an adjacent enemy triggers the battle and inflicts damage, the enemy receives the same damage.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 受到邻接的敌方攻击伤害时，反弹相同的伤害

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of receiving a Katana, Naginata, Club, Yumi or Shuriken if the user defeats the enemy.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝幸运%。自己发动攻击且击倒敌方，将随机获得铁制的刀、薙刀、金棒、和弓、手里剑之一

skills.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Lance.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 敌方装备枪时，命中、回避+50

skills.description: After battle, enemy's Defense -6.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗后，敌人守备-6，逐回合恢复
notes: Enemy debuffs do not stack with another debuff to the same stat; the larger value takes priority, and affected stats recover by 1 each turn.
Serenes Forest uses "Seal Defence"; the canonical name uses the localized "Seal Defense" spelling already established by accepted FE14 data.
notesZhHans: 敌方减益不会与对同一属性的另一减益叠加；取较大值生效，受影响的属性每回合恢复 1 点。
Serenes Forest 使用 “Seal Defence” 拼写；此处采用 FE14 既定数据中已确立的本地化 “Seal Defense” 拼写。

skills.description: Select the "Swap" command to swap places with an adjacent ally on the map.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 可使用换位（入れ替え）指令，和一个邻接的我方交换站位

skills.description: After battle, enemy's Speed -6.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗后，敌人速-6，逐回合恢复
notes: Enemy debuffs do not stack with another debuff to the same stat; the larger value takes priority, and affected stats recover by 1 each turn.
notesZhHans: 敌方减益不会与对同一属性的另一减益叠加；取较大值生效，受影响的属性每回合恢复 1 点。

skills.description: When user is equipped with a Lance, damage +5 during battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 装备枪战斗时，造成的伤害+5

skills.description: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the enemy's Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝技×1.5%。物理攻击时追加敌方力÷2的伤害，魔法攻击时追加敌方魔力÷2的伤害

skills.description: User and enemy's Hit rate +30 and skill activation rate +15% during battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 战斗时双方的命中+30，技能发动率+15

skills.description: Magic +2.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 魔力+2

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of gaining double experience when user defeats the enemy.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝幸运%。自己发动攻击且击倒敌方，获得2倍经验值

skills.description: Magic +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the "Rally" command is used.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 可使用支援指令，使周围2格内的同伴1回合内魔力+4

skills.description: When user is equipped with a Tome, damage +5 during battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 装备魔法书战斗时，造成的伤害+5

skills.description: Luck% chance of leaving the user with 1 HP when they have 2 or more HP.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝幸运%。受到致命攻击时，若HP不为1则可以残留1HP

skills.description: Luck +8 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the "Rally" command is used.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 可使用支援指令，使周围2格内的同伴1回合内幸运+8

provenance.locator: Monk, Shrine Maiden > Rally Luck > Level 10

skills.description: Recover 30% HP at the start of the user's Turn.

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, follow up attack speed +5.

skills.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 20% HP at the start of the user's Turn.

When user triggers the battle, damage +4.

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, Hit rate +40.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 自己发动攻击时，命中+40

skills.description: When user is equipped with a Bow, damage +5 during battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 装备弓战斗时，造成的伤害+5

skills.description: User can open doors and chests without requiring keys.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 无需钥匙也可开门、开宝箱

skills.description: When user triggers the battle, the enemy's HP is reduced by 20% after the battle.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 自己发动攻击时，战斗后敌方HP减少其HP最大值的20%

skills.description: Skill x 0.25% chance of instantly defeating the enemy when dealing 1 or more damage.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝技÷4%。当攻击能造成至少1点伤害时，一击必杀

skills.description: When user is equipped with a Dagger, damage +5 during battle.

skills.description: Attacks are effective against Mechanists, Automatons and Stoneborn.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 攻击附加对傀儡师、傀儡人偶、石巨人特效

skills.description: Select the "Replicate" command once per map to create a replica with the same appearance, stats, inventory and HP as the user (Anything that happens to the replica happens to the user and vice versa - even death).
skills.descriptionZhHans: 可使用复制（写し身）指令，复制一个和自己一样的作战单位，共享HP，每场战斗仅限1次

skills.description: The effect of HP recovery and stat-boosting potions is increased by 50%.
skills.descriptionZhHans: HP回复药和能力上升药的效果提升50%

skills.description: After consuming a HP recovery or stat-boosting potion, the user can perform another action.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 使用HP回复药和能力上升药后，仍可以继续行动

skills.description: Luck% chance of obtaining a Gold Bar after moving during the first seven Turns.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 发动率＝幸运%。在前7个回合每次行动完毕有机会获得1个小金块

skills.description: During battles, user spends a Gold Bar for damage +10 and damage received -10.

skills.description: During even-numbered Turns, damage +4.

skills.description: The enemy's HP is reduced by 20% after the battle.

skills.description: Luck +4.

skills.description: Adds 10% to all growth rates during Level Ups.

skills.description: Hit rate and Avoid +15 when user's Level is lower than the enemy (promoted units count as Level +20).
skills.descriptionZhHans: 自己比敌方等级低时，命中、回避+15（上位职业的等级按+20算）

skills.description: Experience gained x 1.2.

skills.description: Skill x 0.75% chance of adding 50% of the user's Attack Power as damage.

skills.description: User shares their support unit's battle skills.
skills.descriptionZhHans: 以攻阵、防阵战斗时，自己可享有支援同伴的特技
notes: Battle skills are activation-rate skills that can trigger during battle, such as Astra, Luna, Sol, Miracle, Pavise, and Aegis.
notesZhHans: 战斗特技是可在战斗中发动的概率发动型特技，例如流星、月环、日光、祈祷、大盾与圣盾。

skills.description: When user fights in terrain with no terrain effects, damage +3 during battles.
